changelog: FIXED: Side-rail RIGHT-arrow now lands on the first card of every section, not just Discovery. Root cause was LazyRow's virtualisation breaking Compose's focus tree — every other home row (Streaming Services, Collections, Genres, Years, Themes & Moods) now uses Plain Row + horizontalScroll exactly like Continue Watching has done since v1.43.0+. The pattern was already documented inside HomeContinueWatchingSection.kt — finally applied app-wide.
Continue Watching is the default first home section when in progress (from v1.43.92).
Themes & Moods row sits above the Decades row on Home (from v1.43.91).
